title: Streamer.bot Tutorial
description: An introduction to Streamer.bot, covering core functionality and progressing into building custom automation workflows for stream management.

title: 3D Modeling Part 1
description: Part one of a two-part series focused on designing a custom riser station for the Bambu Lab A1 using Fusion 360.

title: 3D Modeling Part 2
description: Continuation of the riser station project, refining the design and preparing the model for practical use and production.

title: Website Build Part 1
description: Kickoff of a four-part series building a custom streaming website, including project setup, structure, and initial development workflow.

title: Website Build Part 2
description: Expansion of the website build, focusing on layout development, styling, and refining the user interface.

title: Website Build Part 3
description: Further development of the site, introducing interactivity and integrating dynamic behavior using JavaScript.

title: Website Build Part 4
description: Finalization of the website, including optimization, feature completion, and preparing the project for deployment.
